title: The Garden
name: Redemption Camp
blurb: We will marry at Redemption Camp, in a hall dressed as a garden — lush greenery, blooms, and soft light, kept cool and dry whatever the weather. Everything happens under one roof, from the first hymn to the last dance.
openLine: The day begins at 10 in the morning

dressCode.title: Garden formal
dressCode.body: Long dresses, agbada, gele, and a well cut suit. Wear the house colours where you can: ivory, emerald, and gold. Comfortable shoes for an evening of dancing are wise.

children.title: An adults only celebration
children.body: To allow every guest to relax in the hall, we have chosen an adults only day, with the warm exception of those named on your invitation.
